samudita p. p.
1 Gone up, risen, ascended.
2 Lofty, elevated.
3
(pb) Produced, arisen, occasioned.
4 Assembled, collected, united; madbhāgyopacayādayaṃ samuditaḥ sarvo guṇānāṃ gaṇaḥ  Ratn. 1. 6. 
5 Possessed of, furnished with.
6 Conversed.
7 Spoken to, addressed.
8 Agreed upon.
9 Customary, usual.
